info.name: Attendify - Delegate API
info.description:
Delegate API collection for Attendify.

Frontend auth flow for this collection:
1. `POST /api/delegate/login`
2. Save `response.data.data.token` and `response.data.data.user`
3. `GET /api/delegate/profile`
4. `POST /api/delegate/devices/token` if Firebase push is enabled
5. Use the same bearer token for delegate endpoints and for the delegate personal inbox that reuses some student endpoints
6. `DELETE /api/delegate/devices/token` before `POST /api/delegate/logout`

Delegates use both delegate endpoints and student endpoints. Use `/api/delegate/notifications` for operational batch alerts, `/api/delegate/news` for delivered broadcast batches, and `/api/student/notifications` for the personal inbox. QR attendance session management is available under `/api/delegate/qr-attendance/*`.

request.description: Get comprehensive dashboard data: Stats (Lectures, Alerts, Weekly Rate), Subjects list, Top absent students, At-Risk students (>20% absence), and Recent attendance.
Returns user balance, subscription expiry, and list of available upgrade packages.
Returns current balance and paginated list of transactions (deposits, payments, etc.).
Returns a URL for mobile clients to download the financial statement PDF.
Returns subject with its doctor, term, resources, and assignments.
Create a schedule row. hall_name is optional and can be null.
Update a schedule row. hall_name remains optional.
Returns stats and list of resources.
Upload a course resource (e.g., Lecture, Summary). Supports medical metadata like unit_coordinator, clinical_unit, etc.
Paginated list of students in the delegate's batch.
View current permission status for a student (e.g., upload_shared_library).
Grant or revoke library upload permissions for a student. Note: Delegates cannot grant 'generate_cards'.
Returns subjects and grouped attendance sessions. Delegate attendance now supports gender-filtered passes and merge-mode completion for the same lecture.
Stores manual attendance for an official or special lecture. Supports lecture_type=official|special, gender_filter=all|male|female, and merge-mode completion for split attendance passes.
Load subject, students, and prefill data for delegate attendance entry. Supports gender_filter=all|male|female and returns merge-mode guidance.
Returns the delegate attendance report and now includes lecture_type, attendance_method, recorded_by_name, and recorded_by_role.
Returns paginated list of announcements along with full statistics: `total`, `academic_count`, `general_count`, `urgent_count`, `pinned_count`.

formdata.value: The results for anatomy will be posted tomorrow.

body.raw:
{
    "subject_id": 1,
    "title": "HW 1: Anatomy Intro",
    "description": "Write a summary of the first lecture.",
    "due_date": "2024-03-15",
    "requires_submission": true
}

request.description: Returns reminders filtered by `notify_at`. Statistics included: `total`, `upcoming`, `past`.
Returns a list of students in the same major and level to start a conversation with.
Returns a list of doctors teaching the delegate's subjects to start a conversation with.
Update status (pending, answered, closed) or set visibility for other students.

item.name: 16. Profile & Auth

request.description:
Authenticate a delegate account.

Request body:
- `email`
- `password`

Save the returned token from `response.data.data.token`, save the user object from `response.data.data.user`, then call `GET /api/delegate/profile`.
Use this request immediately after login and on app start to verify the saved delegate token and hydrate the current profile.

Register or refresh the Firebase device token for the current delegate session.

Call this immediately after a successful login and again whenever the FCM token changes.
Request body:
- `device_token`: the Firebase/FCM token from the device
- `platform`: `android`, `ios`, or `web`
- `device_name`: optional human-readable device label
- `app_version`: optional app version string

Remove the Firebase device token for the current delegate session.

Call this before logout when push notifications are enabled, then call the normal logout endpoint and clear local storage.
If push is enabled, call `DELETE /api/delegate/devices/token` first with the current FCM token, then call logout and clear local storage.

item.description:
Authentication runtime for delegate clients:
1. Login with `email` and `password`
2. Save `response.data.data.token`
3. Call `GET /api/delegate/profile`
4. Register Firebase token with `POST /api/delegate/devices/token`
5. Reuse the same token for delegate endpoints and the delegate personal inbox endpoints
6. Remove the device token before logout

request.description: Get classified absence stats and history. Stats object includes: `total`, `danger` (>=5), `warning` (>=3), `normal` (<3).
Fetch delivered broadcast batches visible in the delegate news center. The feed is grouped by `batch_id` and may include announcements, exams, assignments, attendance alerts, and polls.

item.name: Get News Batch Details & Poll Options

request.description: Get one delivered news batch by `batch_id`. If the batch is a poll, the response also includes poll options and voting status.
Vote on a poll batch using its `batch_id`.
Fetch the personal inbox notifications for the current delegate account. Delegates intentionally reuse the student notification endpoints for this inbox.
Get the unread count for the delegate personal inbox via the student notification endpoint.
Mark one delegate personal inbox notification as read via the student notification endpoint.
Mark all delegate personal inbox notifications as read via the student notification endpoint.

body.raw: {"category_id":{{category_id}},"helper_user_id":{{helper_user_id}},"delegation_type":"partial","title":"Grade Support Task","notes":"Data entry only without final approval","due_at":"2026-04-10 18:00:00","student_ids":[10,11,12]}

item.name: 19. Desktop QR Pairing
item.description: Desktop QR flow for delegate and practical delegate accounts. Use delegate token to issue the code, then switch to desktop token for the Windows app.

request.description: Generate a pairing code from the authenticated delegate account.
Exchange the pairing code for a desktop token.
Validate the saved desktop token on startup.
Get only subjects where allow_delegate_attendance=true for this delegate cohort.
Start a delegate QR attendance session from the desktop app.
Poll live attendance status, scanned_count, recent_scans, and verification summary.
Finalize the desktop session and hand off final review to the website via redirect_url.
Revoke the desktop token when the device is unpaired.
